title: Evan's Vanilla+
description: A small Vanilla+ modpack for 1.20.1, which adds new structures, mobs, and game mechanics to Minecraft!
body:
# WELCOME TO MY FIRST MODPACK!

## version20 UPDATE!
- I updated the entire modlist! Please check it out when you have the chance!
- **PLEASE DO NOT USE THE v20 PACK ON A WORLD YOU USED v10 WITH, THIS WILL BREAK YOUR GAME.**

Some mods/datapacks you may be familiar with include [Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound), [Serene Seasons](https://modrinth.com/mod/serene-seasons), [Cliff Tree](https://modrinth.com/datapack/clifftree), [Chipped](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped), [Handcrafted](https://modrinth.com/mod/handcrafted), [Tom's Simple Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage), and some of [purejosh's](https://modrinth.com/user/purejosh) tools/weapons! 

## version10 & ALL FUTURE VERSIONS!
My modpack aims to only add a handful of mods that add new features to the game, while simultaneously keeping it simple and feel as if Mojang added the features themselves.

It adds new structures for players to explore in the overworld and nether with the use of [Dungeons and Taverns](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns), while also adding new rare caves to the overworld as well with the use of [Alex's Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves)!

Play with your friends easily by opening up a server with the use of [Essential](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential), a mod that aims at providing a very beginner friendly experience to opening up a simple server, right from the game!

You'll find new beautifully designed mobs roaming your entire minecraft world with [Alex's Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs), which adds 89 new creatures to the game!

Make windmills, trains, or even elevators with the use of [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create), where you can defy the rules of Vanilla minecraft while also keeping it within the confines of what Vanilla+ really stands for.

Finally, make fulfilling foods that can add 2 new buffs to the player with the use of [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight), which adds new crops, new cooking mechanics, and new foodstuffs that the player can use to aid themselves around their world!

I only covered a couple of the big mods that are included in this little modpack, but there's even more for you to discover!

This modpack also includes lots of optimization mods that will make your game run smoothly, so expect your PC to not EXPLODE when running this pack. This is thanks to the other famous modpack [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop) of course, so all thanks goes to that modpack creator.
